scripts.build:patch: eval $(pnpm --filter @dnhyxc-ai/scripts --silent export) && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version patch && pnpm -C apps/frontend tauri build && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit update-latest && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-release && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-dmg
scripts.build:minor: eval $(pnpm --filter @dnhyxc-ai/scripts --silent export) && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version minor && pnpm -C apps/frontend tauri build && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit update-latest && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-release && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-dmg
scripts.build:major: eval $(pnpm --filter @dnhyxc-ai/scripts --silent export) && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version major && pnpm -C apps/frontend tauri build && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit update-latest && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-release && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit upload-dmg
scripts.version:patch: pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version patch
scripts.version:minor: pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version minor
scripts.version:major: pnpm -C apps/frontend exec release-kit bump-version major
scripts.deploy: pnpm -C apps/frontend run build && pnpm run publish
